name: caitie
ai_summary: caitie has babysitting and special needs experience and loves working with children of all abilities. She is patient, uses a fair conflict resolution approach, and seeks a full-time role in Augusta, GA to make an impact on kids' growth.

transcripts.q3:
My name is Katie Hewitt. I have worked with children through babysitting up until I got to high school and then I started working with the special needs kids at my school and I learned a lot about them and a lot about myself, one of those things being that I absolutely love working with kids with of all abilities. Not
 Just with disabilities or fully able. I just love working with kids and loved being a part of their growth and like their upbringing. I I just a lot of people for my child to have a big impact on me. So I want to be able to do that for other kids.
transcripts.q4: I live in Augusta, Georgia, and I'm really willing to travel. As far as I need to pour a shift.
transcripts.q5:
At the moment, I'm looking for full-time work.
 and I'm available all days of the week, anytime of the day,
transcripts.q6: So, with conflict between two children, I like to get both sides of the story separately from both kids, just to make sure that they both feel heard and understood. And just so they both know that their feelings are completely valid. And then I like to have them apologize to each other. No matter who I think, is in the wrong and the right that little, I'm sorry, just means a lot to those people.
transcripts.q7:
I like to think that I'm a very patient person especially when it comes to working with kids because they are still learning and most most everything they see in their everyday life. It's something new today. So,
 I just really, I really love to be a part of that learning experience and making sure that kids are related into the right direction for their future.
